title: 4 Electric Power Stocks to Buy From the Prospering Industry

title: AEP COMPLETES SALE OF CARDINAL PLANT UNIT 1
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Aug. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has completed the sale of the 595-megawatt (MW) Cardinal Plant Unit 1 in Brilliant, Ohio, from AEP Generation Resources, the company's competitive generation affiliate, to Buckeye Power. In March, AEP reached an agreement to sell Cardinal Plant Unit 1 and the company's ownership stake in Cardinal Operating Company to Buckeye Power.

title: AEP NAMES HAWKINS VICE PRESIDENT OF FINANCE & TREASURY
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Aug. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has named Renee V. Hawkins vice president – Finance & Treasury, effective Aug. 6.
